evals.prompt: Create an Ideogram 4 prompt for a photorealistic portrait of an elderly Japanese woman wearing a red kimono, sitting in a zen garden with cherry blossoms falling around her. Warm golden hour lighting.
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON with photograph medium, golden hour lighting, red/green/pink color palette, elements for the woman and cherry blossoms
expectations: Output is valid, parseable JSON
Uses compact JSON separators (no spaces after : or ,)
Has compositional_deconstruction with background and elements
Has high_level_description field
Has style_description with photo field (not art_style)
medium is set to photograph
Key order in style_description follows: aesthetics, lighting, photo, medium, color_palette
Key order in elements follows: type, bbox, desc (for obj elements)
All hex colors are uppercase #RRGGBB format
Color palette includes warm/golden tones and red
Background describes the zen garden setting
Elements include the elderly woman as a distinct object
No markdown code fences wrapping the output
No preamble or explanation text before the JSON

evals.prompt: I need a flat vector illustration for a tech startup logo. It should show a stylized rocket ship taking off with the text 'LAUNCHPAD' underneath. Use blue and green colors on a white background.
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON with graphic_design medium, art_style field, text element for LAUNCHPAD, blue/green/white palette
expectations: Output is valid, parseable JSON
Uses compact JSON separators (no spaces after : or ,)
Has compositional_deconstruction with background and elements
Has style_description with art_style field (not photo)
medium is set to graphic_design or illustration
Key order in style_description follows: aesthetics, lighting, medium, art_style, color_palette
Contains a text element with text field set to LAUNCHPAD
Text element key order follows: type, bbox, text, desc
All hex colors are uppercase #RRGGBB format
Color palette includes blue and green tones
Elements include the rocket ship as a distinct object
No markdown code fences wrapping the output
No preamble or explanation text before the JSON

evals.prompt: make me a picture of a cyberpunk city street at night with neon signs in pink and cyan, rain-slicked streets reflecting the lights, a lone figure in a trench coat walking away from camera
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON with cinematic/photograph style, neon pink and cyan colors, dark moody palette, multiple elements for signs/street/figure
expectations: Output is valid, parseable JSON
Uses compact JSON separators (no spaces after : or ,)
Has compositional_deconstruction with background and elements
Has style_description with photo or art_style field
All hex colors are uppercase #RRGGBB format
Color palette includes pink and cyan neon tones
Background describes the cyberpunk city street at night
Elements include the lone figure as a distinct object
Elements include neon signs or reflections as distinct objects
Lighting description mentions neon/rain/reflections or similar cyberpunk atmosphere
No markdown code fences wrapping the output
No preamble or explanation text before the JSON

evals.prompt: Ideogram 4 prompt: a 3D rendered isometric room of a cozy bookshelf nook with warm fairy lights, a small reading chair, and a sleeping cat on a rug. Octane render style with soft shadows.
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON with 3d_render medium, isometric composition, warm colors, elements for bookshelf/chair/cat
expectations: Output is valid, parseable JSON
Uses compact JSON separators (no spaces after : or ,)
Has compositional_deconstruction with background and elements
medium is set to 3d_render
Has style_description with art_style field (not photo)
All hex colors are uppercase #RRGGBB format
Elements include the bookshelf as a distinct object
Elements include the reading chair as a distinct object
Elements include the sleeping cat as a distinct object
Each element has a bbox for spatial placement
No markdown code fences wrapping the output
No preamble or explanation text before the JSON

evals.prompt: Create a prompt for an oil painting of a stormy sea with a lighthouse on a rocky cliff. Dramatic, moody atmosphere with dark blues, greys, and a warm yellow light from the lighthouse.
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON with painting medium, dramatic lighting, dark blue/grey/yellow palette, elements for lighthouse/sea/cliff
expectations: Output is valid, parseable JSON
Uses compact JSON separators (no spaces after : or ,)
Has compositional_deconstruction with background and elements
medium is set to painting
Has style_description with art_style field (not photo)
All hex colors are uppercase #RRGGBB format
Color palette includes dark blues, greys, and warm yellow
Elements include the lighthouse as a distinct object
Elements include the stormy sea or waves
Lighting description captures dramatic/moody atmosphere
No markdown code fences wrapping the output
No preamble or explanation text before the JSON
